title: agropyron intermedium var. arenicola
intro: Agropyron intermedium var. arenicola, also known as sand bluegrass or sand wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Agropyron intermedium var. arenicola include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
